PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://www.pps.go.kr/bichuk/bbs/view.do?key=00825&bbsSn=2606110004" -UseBasicParsing -UserAgent "Mozilla/5.0"; $ms = [regex]::Matches\($r.Content, '\(\\d[\\d,]+\)[^<]{0,10}'\); foreach \($m in $ms\) { $v = $m.Groups[1].Value -replace ',',''; if \($v.Length -ge 7\) { $ton = [long]$v; if \($ton -ge 1000000 -and $ton -le 50000000\) { Write-Host "Found: $\($m.Groups[1].Value\) => $ton"; break } } })
